message.content:
@startuml
left to right direction
actor "Nurse" as nurse
participant ": RecordAdverseReactionUI" as ui
participant ": RecordAdverseReactionController" as controller
participant ": Company" as company
participant ": AdverseReactionStore" as store
participant ": AdverseReactionDTO" as dto
participant ": AdverseReactionMapper" as mapper
participant ": WaitingRoomStore" as waitingRoomStore
participant ": AdverseReaction" as adverseReaction

nurse -> ui: 1 Starts recording adverse reaction
activate ui
ui -> nurse: 2 asks for data(SNS Number, Adverse Reaction Text)
nurse --> ui: 3 types requested data
deactivate ui

ui -> controller: 4 createAdverseReaction(SNSNumber, advReact)
activate controller
controller -> waitingRoomStore: 5 wstore = getWaitingRoomStore()
controller -> waitingRoomStore: 6 store = getRecordAdverseReactionStore()
controller -> waitingRoomStore: 7 snsus = getSNSUserInTheWaitingRoomByItsSNSNumber(snsuserNumber)
controller -> waitingRoomStore: 8 vc = getVaccinationCenterBySNSNumber(snsuserNumber)
controller -> store: 9 ar = createAdverseReaction(snsus, advReact, vc)
activate store
store -> adverseReaction: 10 create(snsus,advReact,vc)
deactivate store

controller -> store: 11 validateAdverseReaction(ar)
activate store
deactivate store

controller -> mapper: 12 toDTO(ar)
activate mapper
mapper --> controller: 13 arDTO
deactivate mapper

controller --> ui: 14 arDTO
deactivate controller

ui -> nurse: 15 shows SNS User correspondent to the SNS Number and adverse reaction waiting for approval
nurse --> ui: 16 confirms action
activate ui
ui -> controller: 17 saveAdverseReaction()
activate controller
controller -> store: 18 saveAdverseReaction(ar)
activate store
store -> store: 19 validateAdverseReaction(ar)
deactivate store
store -> store: 20 addAdverseReaction(ar)
deactivate store

controller --> nurse: 21 informs oppertion success
deactivate ui

@enduml
